title: The Golden Bell Becomes the Goal
description: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Luffy, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Yes! It's that hole for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They were not among the 5 survivors...

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: To see that my prediction was off...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you the one called Enel!?

summary: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
